# Best Solution (Dot Dynasty LLC)

Best Solution is a family-run American brand of professional jewelry, metal, and glass polish, trusted since 1985. Owner: Justin Greco, Waterford, Wisconsin. Website: https://bestsolutionpolish.com. Phone: 414-213-0084. Email: BestSolutionPolish@gmail.com.

## Products

- Best Solution Jewelry, Metal & Glass Polish (purple bottle): a liquid polish with no ammonia, no acid, and no abrasives. Safe on every gemstone, from diamonds, rubies, emeralds, and sapphires to soft, porous opals and pearls. Also shines every type of metal plus eyeglasses, mirrors, and glass with no fog and no streaks. Sizes: 2 oz ($15), 8 oz ($25), 16 oz ($30), 32 oz ($35).
- C5 Metal Restoration Lotion (white bottle): removes tarnish, oxidation, and light surface scratches from real metal (gold, silver, sterling, platinum, brass, copper, chrome, stainless). Real metal only, not for plated or costume jewelry. Sizes: 2 oz ($20), 8 oz ($30).
- Sets pairing polish with C5, glasses sets with an eyeglass repair kit, and a $100 Show Special with the whole lineup.

## Why people choose it

- Safe for opals and pearls, which most jewelry cleaners can damage
- No ammonia, no acid, no abrasives
- Made in the USA, family-run since 1985
- 100% money-back guarantee
- Free shipping on every order, ships same or next day
- Sold in person with live demos at fairs and shows across Wisconsin, Illinois, and Indiana

## How it works

Two-step system: rub C5 lotion on real metal to lift tarnish and oxidation, then use Best Solution polish to clean and bring back the shine on jewelry, stones, and glass.
